category_explanations.inherited_method: self.logger.X / self._logger.X — callee is on a base class we don't scan.
category_explanations.self_attr_unknown: self._attr.X — we know the attr exists but don't know its type.
category_explanations.string_literal_method: 'X'.method() — call on a string literal; no named callee.
category_explanations.builtin: len/isinstance/exception constructors — Python builtins, no module namespace.
category_explanations.local_var_method: var.X() — var is a local variable with no type annotation.
category_explanations.bare_name: X() — closures, super(), and other names not tied to any def.
